name: autoresearch-codex
description: Portable autoresearch setup for Codex on CPU-first local hardware, with CUDA and Apple Silicon defaults.

interface.longDescription: Installs a Codex skill that bootstraps a portable Karpathy-style autoresearch workspace, choosing CPU, CUDA, or Apple Silicon defaults automatically and generating the local experiment loop files for Codex.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap portable autoresearch in this repo
Set up autoresearch for this CPU-only VPS
Prepare Codex to run autoresearch on Mac
